profile_purpose: Inform article writing so that content resonates with taxi company owners and drives engagement and conversion.
who_they_are: Independent taxi firm owners and operators in the UK managing between 5 and 50 vehicles. Often owner-operators who started as drivers. Juggling dispatch, drivers, compliance, and costs with a small or no back-office team.
what_they_care_about: Keeping vehicles on the road and earning
Knowing where every vehicle is at all times
Reducing vehicle theft and unauthorised use
Protecting the business from driver disputes and false claims
Cutting costs without cutting corners on safety
core_pains_to_address: Drivers using vehicles outside agreed hours or areas
No footage when a passenger makes a complaint or claim
Fleet insurance premiums increasing year on year
Vehicles going missing or being used without authorisation
Managing driver behaviour across a fleet with no real visibility
beliefs_to_align_with: A well-monitored fleet is a well-run fleet
Technology that gives you visibility saves money in the long run
Driver accountability starts with having the evidence to back it up
Insurance companies respond to data, not just good faith
objections_to_pre-empt: My drivers will push back on being tracked
I've tried fleet tech before and it created more admin than it solved
Is this built for a small operation or only for large fleets?
What happens when something goes wrong — who do I call?

use: References to real fleet pain points — driver disputes, insurance renewals, vehicle downtime
UK-specific context — local licensing, fleet insurance, private hire regulations
Outcomes over features — what changes day to day, not what the product does
avoid: Anything that sounds like it was written for a logistics multinational
Vague efficiency language with no concrete meaning
Tone that talks down to small business owners

conversion_goal: Reader recognises the gap in their current setup, sees Traknova as a practical solution built for operations like theirs, and books a conversation or requests more information.
